titleStmt.title: SII 41.327: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 327. (A.R. No. 543 of 1905.) Tiruveḷḷaṟai, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the ruined temple in Tiruvellaṟai.

summary.p: Fragment. Seems to register a sale of tirunāmattukkāṇi land belonging to the temple by the temple trustees to Paḻuvūr-kiḻavan Nakkan Aravāṇḍār alias Maḻavarāyan, as the land was lying uncultivated and as the temple offerings and rituals suffered due to shortage of income.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lāmaiyāle kārppayir pokaccetamāy Innilam payiṟce varicaiyāḷarāluñ ceyalilāmai kāruṭal tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkup potāmaiyāle Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa Irācentiracoḻanallūrum ceṉṉi nallūrum koḷvāṟku
rājagambhiravaḷa nāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭup paḻuvūr kiḻavan nakkan Aravāṇṭārāṉa maḻavarāyaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Iṉṉāyanār tevatāṉam neṟkuppaip piṟinta Irācentiracoḻanallūṟ kicainta kiḻpāṟ kellai perur ciṟutavūr E
tiruveḷḷaṟaip piṭākai Ariyan patāta(ka)nallūr kiḻkūṟellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ivvūr Ellaikkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉānkellai Uṭpaṭṭa Ūr nattamum viḷai nilamum puṉceyyum Uṭpaṭavum Ivvūr viḷai nilamāy neṟkuppaiyil Uṭkiṭaiyāna tiruviḷakkupuṟama
ccaruppeti maṅkalattu nilattukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai neṟkuppai Āṟṟuvāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
Digital edition of SII 41.327 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
